advice.generic: Suppression Field targets a player; pre-spread so it does not cleave and, if targeted, move as little as possible because movement increases damage taken.
advice.tank: Hold the pack steady so the target can minimize movement without being forced through mobs or puddles.
advice.healer: Watch the target while they are slowed/limited; they may need spot healing if forced to move.
advice.dps: If targeted, stop unnecessary movement and let the group move away from you.

advice.generic: Eclipsing Step hits two players; spread enough to avoid cleaving others and use a defensive if low.
advice.healer: Pre-hot/spot heal the two targets and watch the DoT after the hit.
advice.dps: If targeted, move out from allies but stay close enough to maintain group control.

1249815.name: Transference

advice.generic: Transference redirects healing into the caster; dispel immediately because leaving it up makes healing the player ineffective.
advice.healer: This is an emergency Magic dispel. Clear it before committing throughput into the target.
advice.dps: Call it if you have it and use a defensive until the dispel lands.

1249815.notes: Redirects healing to the caster; immediate dispel — leaving it up invalidates healing.

advice.generic: Avoid Leyline Array beams unless you have Reflux Charge; charged players should intentionally stand at beam intersections to disable as many lines as possible.
advice.tank: If a melee has Reflux Charge, position the boss closer to beams so they can clear safely without losing all uptime.
advice.healer: Watch charged players as they intentionally touch beams and may take follow-up damage/stun.
advice.dps: Without Reflux Charge, dodge beams; with Reflux Charge, clear an intersection on purpose.

advice.generic: Dark Beckoning causes pulsing damage and projectiles; dodge the projectiles while using personals if the pulse overlaps other damage.
advice.healer: Prepare healing for the pulsing damage; it can become dangerous with absorbs or Dusk Frights movement.
advice.dps: Maintain movement discipline during the pulse instead of tunneling through projectiles.

advice.generic: Dark Beckoning fires projectiles during pulsing damage; keep moving through safe gaps and avoid adding avoidable hits to the healer check.
advice.healer: Use group healing if players are forced to move while damage pulses.
advice.dps: Dodge projectiles and use a personal if you are targeted by other damage at the same time.

advice.generic: Flailstorm is an AoE/fixate danger; kite if fixated and avoid standing in the storm.
advice.tank: Face the Dreadflail away for Void Lash and be ready to move when Flailstorm begins.
advice.healer: Watch the fixated player while they kite; they may outrange you if they panic.
advice.dps: If fixated, kite through safe space; if not, stay out and keep damage on the mob.

advice.generic: Brilliant Dispersion targets three players and spawns Fractured Images; spread the hits and then avoid the images’ proximity attacks and dash paths.
advice.tank: Keep the boss positioned so images do not trap melee against walls or puddles.
advice.healer: Track the three targets and be ready for image/dash mistakes afterward.
advice.dps: Spread for the hit, then avoid images and do not stand within 5 yards of them.

advice.generic: Searing Rend is tank damage that leaves puddles; tank uses a defensive and drops puddles out of the group path.
advice.tank: Defensive every Searing Rend and move puddles to the edge/out of melee space.
advice.healer: Expect tank spikes plus DoT/puddle movement; pre-position for range.
advice.dps: Do not stand where the tank is dropping Searing Rend puddles.

advice.generic: Flicker dashes Fractured Images through players; watch image facing/path and avoid standing in the dash line.
advice.healer: Expect sudden spikes when players are clipped by image dashes.
advice.dps: Do not stand between images and their dash destination; reposition before the dash resolves.

advice.generic: Erratic Zap creates avoidable circles; keep moving and avoid stacking circles with other players.
advice.healer: Watch for Erratic Zap during Arcing Mana; players may need healing while dodging.
advice.dps: Move out immediately and return to target; do not soak unnecessary circles.

advice.generic: Daze indicates you were clipped by a movement/impact mechanic; use freedom/movement tools and avoid stacking it with follow-up ground effects.
advice.healer: Watch dazed players because they may fail the next movement check.
advice.dps: Clear the snare if possible and reposition before the next beam/puddle pattern.

advice.generic: Corespark Detonation knocks players and creates Flux Collapse/Sparkburn pressure; stay clear of impact, brace for knockback, and bait resulting puddles to the edge.
advice.tank: Position so knockbacks do not throw players into beams or existing puddles.
advice.healer: Plan cooldowns after detonation to remove Sparkburn/healing absorbs quickly.
advice.dps: Use personals if low before detonation; avoid the impact and keep puddles out of the center afterward.

advice.generic: Searing Rend is a tank hit with persistent puddles; keep the puddles organized so the arena remains usable.
advice.tank: Use mitigation and place the puddle away from boss/melee paths.
advice.healer: Watch the tank during the hit and movement after it.
advice.dps: Give the tank a clean lane to drop the puddle.

advice.generic: Nullify must be interrupted every cast; missed casts are a major wipe risk in both trash and boss add waves.
advice.tank: Position Nullifiers where melee/ranged interrupts can reach them.
advice.healer: Be ready if a cast slips, but the correct play is prevention through kicks.
advice.dps: Assign kicks and hold one for Nullify instead of spending all stops on filler damage.

advice.generic: Flux Collapse creates puddles on players; bait them toward the room edge and keep the center/beam paths open.
advice.tank: Hold the boss so edge baiting is possible and melee are not forced to drop puddles under the boss.
advice.healer: Be ready for damage while players move to edges, especially before Corespark Detonation.
advice.dps: If targeted, place puddles at the edge, not in the center path.

advice.generic: Power Flux creates circles and puddles around Circuit Seer pulls; dodge circles and move away from the puddles left behind.
advice.tank: Do not pin the group between Power Flux puddles and Mana Batteries.
advice.healer: Circuit Seer pulls are healer-heavy; prepare cooldowns if Arcing Mana overlaps with Power Flux movement.
advice.dps: Dodge first, then swap to Mana Batteries if they activate.

advice.generic: Holy Echo should be purged when possible; otherwise expect AoE damage/healing zones on death.
advice.healer: Prepare for extra group damage if Holy Echo is not removed before the mob dies.
advice.dps: Purge the buff if your class can; avoid killing the mob in a position that benefits enemies.

advice.generic: Holy Bolt is a random-target cast that should be interrupted consistently, especially in light-wing pulls.
advice.healer: Spot heal targets if Holy Bolt gets through while Burning Radiance is active.
advice.dps: Use kicks on Holy Bolt; do not let repeated bolts drain healer capacity.

advice.generic: Flux Collapse puddles should be baited toward the edge; do not fill intersections or central movement lanes.
advice.healer: Spot heal bait targets and call if safe space is running out.
advice.dps: Move early to an edge and return after the puddle drops.

1269286.name: Suppression Field
1269286.summary: A snare cleared by movement-immunity (Freedom), not a healer dispel.

advice.generic: Suppression Field is a snare handled by freedom/movement utility, not a normal healer dispel.
advice.healer: Do not waste a cleanse expecting this to behave like Magic; heal the target and call for freedom if needed.
advice.dps: Use movement-clearing utility if you have it; otherwise minimize movement and avoid stacking on the group.

1269286.notes: Snare. DB2 puts the snare mechanic on the parent cast (1269283), not this aura id, so removableBy is overridden here. Freedom / movement utility clears it; not a healer dispel.

advice.generic: Mirrored Rend comes from Fractured Images near them; keep more than 5 yards away and dodge Flicker dash paths.
advice.healer: Spot heal players who get clipped by image proximity/dashes.
advice.dps: Do not chase the boss through images; path around them and continue cleave safely.

advice.generic: Burning Radiance hits two players; dispel one quickly and heal/defensive the other until the next dispel is available.
advice.healer: Remove one immediately, then commit healing to the second target.
advice.dps: Use a personal if you are not the first dispelled target.

1281636.name: Creeping Void
1281636.summary: A curse that increases Shadow damage taken until it is removed.

advice.generic: Creeping Void is a curse that increases Shadow damage taken; remove it before more shadow damage lands.
advice.healer: If your healer cannot remove curses, call for DPS curse utility.
advice.dps: Use curse removal on affected players quickly; this is not just healer responsibility.

1281636.notes: Curse that increases Shadow damage taken; remove before more Shadow damage lands.

advice.generic: Dusk Frights create fear zones; step out early and do not let the zones trap the interrupt path to Nullify.
advice.tank: Position mobs so fear zones do not cover the group’s kick/staging area.
advice.healer: Be ready for players who eat fear during Dark Beckoning or other pulse damage.
advice.dps: Avoid fear zones and keep your interrupt available for Nullify.
